# Assets — Director_Ship Output

This folder will be populated by `Director_Ship` when you run it from Claude Code.

**Do not manually edit files in this directory during an automated run.** All assets (scenes, prefabs, scripts, materials, audio, UI) are generated by the pipeline and tracked in transactions.

After `Director_Ship` completes, you are free to:
- Modify materials, colors, and visual properties in the Inspector
- Tweak script parameters (speeds, damage, spawn rates)
- Adjust UI layouts and styling
- Extend with new mechanics or levels

For a full list of expected outputs, see `/EXPECTED_OUTPUT.md`.
